title: Preparation of Cas9 Protein

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"w0JiJ","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"rUV3R","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":126815,"guid":"41A11A20341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Please see before starting in Guidelines section for materials.","mol_weight":0,"sku":"","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1,"name":"Contributed by users","link":"https://www.protocols.io","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/1.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/1.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Pick 6 colonies to add to 20 ml LB + Amp (Cf=100 ug/ml) starter culture. undetermined, LB + Amp (Cf=100 ug/mL) starter culture
Mix 1 µl of 10 ng/uL DNA + 10 µl Rosetta 2 cells (pRAR-rare codons). undetermined, 10 ng/uL DNA undetermined, Rosetta 2 cells
Recover: Add 300 µl LB, 50’ 37°C on shaker. undetermined, LB Undetermined, Shaker 00:50:00, Shaker
Spin down (6000 xg, 1’), and remove 150 µl LB. 00:01:00, Spin down
Plate 100 µl, 30 µl on 2 AMP plates.
Grow overnight.
Next day: Store XL1 blue 20% glycerol stocks in -80°C. Undetermined, Storage
Add AMP to the flasks (Cf=100 ug/ml).
Thaw cells in water.
Add 20 ml starter culture in the morning, undetermined, starter culture
Grow to OD600=0.6 (150 rpm, ~4 hrs, 37°C). Undetermined, Growing 04:00:00, Growing
Set shaker temp to 16°C. Undetermined, Shaker temperature
*Save 1 ml for SDS-PAGE: uninduced .
Add 0.5 mM IPTG.
Grow overnight (150 rpm, at least 16 hrs, 16°C). Undetermined, Growing 16:00:00, Growing
Harvest cells before lunch: Spin down (4000 rpm, 20’, 4°C). Undetermined, Spin down 00:20:00, Spin down *Keep the cells cold from here.
Completely resuspend pellets in 20 ml Lysis Buffer + 1mM PMSF per bottle. undetermined, Lysis Buffer + 1mM PMSF
Use additional 20 ml Lysis Buffer to wash all bottles. undetermined, Lysis Buffer
Transfer to 50 ml-tubes.
*Save 20 µl for SDS-PAGE: cell pellet
Freeze the cells at -80°C. Undetermined, Freezing cells
Filter sample. HisTrap CV=5ml, FR=2ml/minBuffer A: Lysis buffer, Buffer B: Elution buffer
Push beaker with a stir bar to the bottom of ice bucket.
Add ~50 ml Lysis Buffer and 1 protease inhibitor tablet/50 ml cell. Dissolve the tablets. undetermined, Lysis Buffer
Transfer the cells to the beaker.
Sonicate while stirring: 8’ total, 10” on, 10” off, level 4. Lysate should turn fluid and thin. Repeat 8 min cycle, if necessary. 00:08:00, total 00:00:10, on/off
Transfer to Oak Ridge tubes (30 ml/tube). *Balance within +/- 0.01g.

Pellet cell debris (18,000 rpm, 30’, 4°C). Prepare HisTrap purification. HisTrap CV=5mL, FR=2mL/min Buffer A: Lysis buffer, Buffer B: Elution buffer Undetermined, Pellet cell debris 00:30:00, Pellet cell debris
*Save 20 µl supernatant for SDS-PAGE: cell lysate
Set-up Akta: 1. Turn on UV lamp. 2. Wash Akta with water: pump wash, and flow 50% A, 50% B. 3. Pump wash. 4. Flow 50% A, 50% B. 5. Flow 100% A, until steady baseline. Set baseline to zero.

Apply sample with pump, in the cold room: 1. Fill tubing with water, connect column. 2. Wash: 5CV water. 3. Equilibrate: 5CV lysis buffer. 4. Apply sample to the column. Collect flow-through: Ni-sample loading. Re-apply flow-through to the column, if necessary.
Purification: In the cold room: First wash: 15CV lysis buffer. Collect flow-through: Ni-wash1. Collect flow-through: Ni-wash1 . *Save 20µl for SDS-PAGE.
Wash2: 3CV lysis buffer + 0.1% Triton X. Collect flow-through: Ni-wash2 . *Save 20 µl for SDS-PAGE.
Purification using Akta: First, attach column to Akta (FR=0.9 ml/min).
Wash: 5CV lysis buffer, until steady UV baseline.
Elute: 25CV elution buffer, 100% gradient.
Collect fractions (Fraction size=2.5 ml).
Clean-up: 1. Wash: 5CV water 2. Store: 5CV 20% ethanol 3. Detach column. 4. Wash Akta with water.
Pool appropriate fractions. Rinse collection tubes with elution buffer. *Save 10 µl for SDS-PAGE: Ni-elution
Concentrate with 30K Amicon to ~3 ml volume. Collect flow-though: Ni-Amicon FT.
Add ~1.25 mg TEV/3 ml sample, and mix with pipet. undetermined, TEV
Incubate on shaker, at 4°C overnight. Undetermined, Incubation on shaker 16:00:00, overnight incubation
Next day: *Save 10 µl for SDS-PAGE: postTEV
Add 25 ml of buffer A to sample. undetermined, Buffer A
Heparin CV=5 mL, FR=1 mL/min Buffer A: IEX low salt buffer, Buffer B: IEX high salt buffer
Set-up Akta (FR=2 ml/min).
Apply sample with pump, in the cold room: 1. Equilibrate: 10CV buffer A. 2. Apply sample to the column. Collect flow-through: Hep-sample loading.

Purification: 1. Attach column to Akta (FR=0.9 ml/min). 2. Wash: 15CV buffer A, until steady baseline. 3. Collect flow-through: Hep-wash . *Save 20 µl for SDS-PAGE. 4. Elute: 20CV buffer B, 100% gradient. 5. Collect fractions (Fraction size=2 ml).
Clean-up (FR=2ml/min): 1. Wash: buffer B, until steady conductivity baseline for over 30 ml. 2. Store: 5CV 20% ethanol. 3. Detach column. 4. Wash Akta with water.
Pool appropriate fractions. Rinse collection tubes with buffer B. *Save 10 µl for SDS-PAGE: Hep-elution
Concentrate sample to ~1 ml. Collect flow-through: Hep-Amicon FT.
Leave concentrator on ice, at 4°C overnight. Undetermined, Concentrator on ice

MBPTrap/Superdex 200 CV=120 mL, FR=0.5-1 mL/min Buffer A: Gel filtration buffer Previous day: 1. Set-up Akta (FR=2 mL/min):2. Prepare columns:a. MBPTrap wash: 5CV water, 5CV gel filtration buffer (FR=2 mL/min), in the cold room.b. Attach MBPTrap and Superdex200 to Akta.c. Equilibrate overnight: 2CV gel filtration buffer (FR=0.3 mL/min).*Set end timer volume=240 mL, max pressure alarm=0.25 MPa.
Concentrate sample to ~500 µl. Rinse concentrator with 500 µl gel filtration buffer. undetermined, Gel filtration buffer
Spin down sample (11000 rpm, 4’, 4°C). Transfer supernatant to a new 1.5 ml-tube. Undetermined, Spin down 00:04:00, Spin down
To inject sample, first, clean injection port, sample loop with water, gel filtration buffer.
Now, draw up sample with 1 ml-syringe, and replace the syringe on the injection port.
[LOAD] Inject sample to the loop with syringe.
Purification 1. [INJECT] Apply sample to the column (~3 ml). 2. [LOAD] Flow ~1CV gel filtration buffer. Cas9 elutes at 65-85 ml. 3. Collect fractions (Fraction size=2 ml).

Clean-up (FR=2 ml/min): 1. Detach MBPTrap.2. Wash MBPTrap: 10CV 10mM maltose + gel filtration buffer, in the cold room.3. Store MBPTrap: 5CV 20% ethanol.4. Wash Superdex200: 2CV water (Long-term storage in 20% ethanol).5. Detach Superdex200.6. Wash Akta with water.
Pool appropriate fractions. Rinse collection tubes. *Save 5 µl for SDS-PAGE: Cas9
Concentrate to desired concentration (~40 uM). %s %s
Aliquot 20 µl each into 1.5 ml-tubes.
Snap-freeze in LN2, and store at -80°C. Undetermined, Storage
creator: Meredith Triplet
